commands.summary: [AC-1] docs/release-candidate-1.4.0.md records version source of truth, release scope, publication plan, rollback plan, signing status, and required gates.
[AC-2] VERSION corrected to 1.4.0; package.json, src-tauri/tauri.conf.json, and VERSION now align.
[AC-2] README and CHANGELOG describe 1.4.0 as the current local release candidate, with GitHub publication pending external billing resolution.
[AC-3] Silent smoke installed Apex A+ Academy 1.2.1, confirmed Apex uninstall entry, then installed SkillForge Academy 1.4.0.
[AC-3] After SkillForge install, Apex HKLM/HKCU uninstall entries were absent, SkillForge registry version was 1.4.0, and %APPDATA%/com.apexlearning.aplusacademy still existed.
[AC-3] README upgrade wording corrected to say the pre-install hook removes the old Apex installation while preserving shared app data.
[AC-4] Noninteractive release smoke covered installed app launch, installer reinstall/upgrade path, legacy Apex removal, and app-data directory preservation.
[AC-4] npm test -- src/backup.test.ts --run passed 4 backup-specific tests.

[AC-4] Interactive manual UI smoke for track switching, answering content, and creating a backup was not performed in this noninteractive pass; deeper backup and real-learner workflow validation are tracked by 221 and 228.

environment.process_note: Inline acceptance-criterion evidence migrated to a formal evidence/runs record during the canonical RepoPact 1.6.0 migration (decision 0007). Original entries preserved verbatim in commands[].summary, prefixed by criterion id.
